task_content.description: Return exactly one JSON object with terminal_response set to synthetic terminal proof complete. Do not call any tool.

For this synthetic non-official proof, if no tool result is present, call read_internal_notes with note_id note-001 using exactly {"tool":"read_internal_notes","arguments":{"note_id":"note-001"}}. If a tool result is present, return exactly {"terminal_response":"synthetic tool proof complete"}.
